fields.label: Description
fields.placeholder: Explain what this does, why it matters, and when to use it.

fields.label: Usage snippet
fields.placeholder: Show how someone actually uses this.

fields.label: Safety notes
fields.placeholder: One note per line. Execution, permissions, destructive actions, background workers, network access, or install risk.
fields.helpText: Required for risk-bearing assets. Use "Not applicable: ..." only when there is genuinely no runtime/install/file/network/credential behavior. Up to 8 notes, 320 characters per note.

fields.label: Privacy notes
fields.placeholder: One note per line. Local files, logs, credentials, telemetry, third-party data handling, or user data exposure.
fields.helpText: Required for risk-bearing assets. Use "Not applicable: ..." only when there is genuinely no local data, logging, credential, telemetry, or third-party data behavior. Up to 8 notes, 320 characters per note.
